html:
House Harlaw of Grey Garden
Coat of arms Quartered clockwise: a silver scythe on black, a peacock on cream[N 1]
(Quarterly, 1st and 3rd sable, a scythe argent, 2nd and 4th carnation, a peacock in his pride proper)
Seat Grey Garden, Harlaw
Head Ser Harras Harlaw[4]
Region Iron Islands
Titles
  • Knight of Grey Garden[4]
  • Lord of Greyshield[5]
Overlord House Harlaw

House Harlaw of Grey Garden is a branch of the main House Harlaw that rules the eponymous island from their seat at the Ten Towers. Their seat is Grey Garden.[4]

Contents

  • 1 Recent Events
    • 1.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 2 House Harlaw of Grey Garden at the end of the third century
  • 3 Notes
  • 4 References

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

Ser Harras Harlaw, the Knight of Grey Garden, is the cousin and designated heir of Lord Rodrik Harlaw. His personal banner is the Harlaw scythe quartered with the peacock of his mother's House Serrett.[6] He also bears a Valyrian steel sword called Nightfall.[7]

The banner of Ser Harras is spotted by Asha Greyjoy at Ten Towers.[6] Harras is also spotted by Aeron Greyjoy at the kingsmoot on Old Wyk, where he is one of Asha's champions.[8]

Hotho Harlaw reports to Victarion Greyjoy that during the taking of the Shields, Harras planted his standard beneath Grimston, the Grimm castle on Greyshield, and defeated seven men. The septon in the castle believed the gods had spoken and had surrendered the castle to Harras. He is named Lord of Greyshield by King Euron Greyjoy.[9]

House Harlaw of Grey Garden at the end of the third century[ ]

  • Ser Harras Harlaw, Lord of Greyshield and Knight of Grey Garden, called "the Knight".
